title: Add option to preserve digests on copy and sync
body:
When enabled, if digests can't be preserved an error will be raised.

Signed-off-by: James Hewitt <james.hewitt@uk.ibm.com>

comments.body: Oh — @Jamstah , could you add this to `skopeo sync` as well, please? It’s even more likely to be useful there. (Just a CLI option is fine for now.)
WRT naming, I think let’s wait for a day or so and then merge as proposed if no strong opinion comes up.

> Oh — @Jamstah , could you add this to `skopeo sync` as well, please? It’s even more likely to be useful there. (Just a CLI option is fine for now.)

Not sure what you meant by Just a CLI option, but done, just because I like you :)

I considered it for multi-arch too, but I feel like that wouldn't be useful for sync until we can specify a list of platforms we care about.

> Not sure what you meant by Just a CLI option

Exactly this (i.e. not a new field in the YAML input format). Thanks.

---

> I considered it for multi-arch too, but I feel like that wouldn't be useful for sync until we can specify a list of platforms we care about.

I agree — a single `skopeo copy` can reasonably be a building block for a script building a partial image, but `skopeo sync` works on a large number of images, so it needs to handle each single image without much external help.
